about.title: IT Infrastructure Engineer
about.pitch: Infrastructure Engineer expert in large-scale deployment and administration. Focused on building custom automation tooling for infrastructure management

education.degree: Master of Engineering in Computer Science
education.school: ISIMA - Graduate School of Computer Science & Engineering
education.details: Major in Networks and Security. CyberEdu Label. Core expertise in systems administration, network infrastructure, and cyber-defense.

education.school: IAE Clermont Auvergne - School of Management
education.details: Double degree completed alongside Engineering school. Focused on project management and business strategy.
International academic semester focused on cryptography, network security, and business intelligence.
Two-year highly selective program in advanced mathematics, physics, and engineering sciences.

education.degree: French Baccalaureate in Science (S-SI) – High Honors
education.details: Major in Engineering Sciences. Equivalent to A-Levels / High School Diploma with focus on advanced calculus and mechanics.

experiences.title: IT Infrastructure Engineer
experiences.description: Engineered infrastructure automation tools for large-scale deployments (1,000+ ESXi hosts) and provided technical enablement for international operational teams.
highlights: Reduced manual deployment effort by 75% through PowerCLI & PowerShell automation of VMware vCenter environments.
End-to-end automation of Hyper-V Failover Clusters, including networking, storage (CSV), and security hardening.
Security-as-Code: Automated Palo Alto firewall configurations (Geo-blocking, rulebases) via PAN-OS REST API.
Engineered an automated documentation tool for cluster deployments, saving 1 full day of manual reporting per project.
Developed fault-tolerance testing suites to validate High-Availability (HA) by simulating random outages and verifying VM resilience.
Managed patching cycles for VMware/Datacore/Veeam stacks, including pre-update health-check scripts for storage links.
